summary: Google Calendar Integration Testing - Iteration 81. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified. Google Calendar section appears in Settings > Scheduling tab with Connect button (data-testid='google-calendar-section', 'connect-google-calendar').
critical_code_review_comments: googleCalendarService.ts correctly implements OAuth flow: getAuthUrl(), exchangeCodeForTokens(), storeCalendarConnection()
CalendarConnection model properly defined in Prisma schema with userId, provider, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt fields
MeetingBooking model includes calendarEventId field for Google Calendar event reference
API endpoints correctly require authentication via authMiddleware (returns 401 without token)
OAuth callback properly handles missing params (returns 400)
Booking flow integrates calendar check: checkAvailability() before booking, createEvent() after booking
Calendar operations are non-blocking with try-catch to prevent booking failures
Frontend SchedulingSettings.tsx has proper data-testid attributes: google-calendar-section, connect-google-calendar, disconnect-google-calendar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Calendar integration fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/google-calendar/auth-url returns valid Google OAuth URL with accounts.google.com, GET /api/google-calendar/status returns {connected: false} for test user, DELETE /api/google-calendar/disconnect returns {success: true}, GET /api/google-calendar/callback returns 400 for missing params. Frontend: Settings Modal > Scheduling tab shows Google Calendar section with Connect button (user not connected). Full OAuth flow cannot be tested (requires real Google account consent).

backend_api_tests.auth_url_with_token: PASS - Returns valid Google OAuth URL containing accounts.google.com, calendar scope
backend_api_tests.status_with_token: PASS - Returns {connected: false} for test user

frontend_ui_tests.settings_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking gear icon opens Settings modal
frontend_ui_tests.scheduling_tab: PASS - Scheduling tab visible and clickable
frontend_ui_tests.meeting_types_section: PASS - data-testid='meeting-types-section' present with 2 meeting types

database_schema_verified.CalendarConnection_model: Present with fields: id, userId, provider, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt, scope, createdAt, updatedAt
database_schema_verified.MeetingBooking_calendarEventId: Present - field for storing Google Calendar event ID

oauth_flow_note: Full OAuth flow (actual Google consent) cannot be automated - requires real Google account interaction. Code review confirms: auth URL generated correctly with calendar scopes, callback exchanges code for tokens, tokens stored in CalendarConnection
